post.description:
The real soul-pipeline: paste raw AI-conversation text -> de-identify ->
extract personality (Gemini if configured, rules otherwise) -> characters.

put.description:
Edit display name and/or appearance. Both are cosmetic — radar/stats are
never editable by the player.
Cosmetic only — appearance is decoupled from radar/stats by design.

EncounterOut.title: EncounterOut
EncounterOut.description:
One 邂逅: my sprite met a stranger sprite. Shows the other sprite's public
profile + the short chat + summary; the other OWNER's identity stays hidden
until a mutual wave.
